title: Vivi’s Cover Is Blown
description: On pages 8–11, vivi’s cover is blown as baroque Works agents reveal that Miss Wednesday is Princess Vivi of Alabasta, turning Whiskey Peak into a deadly chase.
scene: Vivi’s Cover Is Blown. Baroque Works agents reveal that Miss Wednesday is Princess Vivi of Alabasta, turning Whiskey Peak into a deadly chase. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: Come give me a hand, Carue!

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: Show your famous speed that can outrun even a leopard!

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: Who the hell told you to sit down!?

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: Hahahaha! Are you sure you should be looking somewhere else right now?

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: I wonder if you can keep up with my acrobatic finesse?

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on vivi’s cover is blown. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
